## Describe your idea

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see.

## Why would it be useful?

Explain what problem it would solve or how it would improve the module.

## Suggested implementation

Optional: describe how you think the feature could work.

## Additional information

Add screenshots, examples or links if relevant.
